basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Junior Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University (IIT BHU)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University (IIT BHU) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Assistant (JRA) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years as of 1st April 2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Physics, Chemistry, Materials Science, Nanoscience, and/or other related allied discipline with 1st division in graduate and postgraduate examinations.
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Physics, Chemistry, Materials Science, Nanoscience, and/or other related allied discipline with 1st division in graduate and postgraduate examinations. Experience in the synthesis and characterization of nanostructures (Desirable).

salary_details.details: Rs. 25,000/- per month for the first 2 years Rs. 28,000/- per month for the 3rd year

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT BHU Junior Research Assistant (JRA) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT BHU Junior Research Assistant (JRA) Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT BHU Junior Research Assistant (JRA) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Junior Research Assistant (JRA) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU JRA recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Junior Research Assistant (JRA) position at IIT BHU is 04 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRA post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Physics, Chemistry, Materials Science, Nanoscience, or a related allied discipline with a first division in both graduate and postgraduate examinations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Assistant (JRA) post is 28 years as of 1st April 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRA role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Assistant (JRA) position is Rs. 25,000/- per month for the first two years and Rs. 28,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT BHU JRA recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their CV in PDF format to Dr. Sunil Kumar Singh via email at [email protected] with the subject line 'Application for CSTUP Project'.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for the Junior Research Assistant (JRA) recruitment at IIT BHU.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRA post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Assistant (JRA) position involves CV screening followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is experience required for this position?
faq.answer: While not mandatory, experience in the synthesis and characterization of nanostructures is considered desirable for the Junior Research Assistant (JRA) role.

faq.question: Q9. What details should be included in the CV?
faq.answer: The CV must include academic records from high school onwards and NET/GATE details if the candidate has qualified for them.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
